history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed on JDK 11 due to missing javax.xml.bind.JAXBException, caused by JAXB being unbundled from the JDK in version 11.
history.qwen_rationale: Inserting a POM_PATCH step to bundle javax.xml.bind:jaxb-api and org.glassfish.jaxb:jaxb-runtime on both the compile and annotation-processor classpaths before the JDK 11 migration step resolves the NoClassDefFoundError.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at JDK 11 with NoClassDefFoundError for javax/annotation/Generated, indicating missing javax.annotation-api dependency required by jpamodelgen or other annotation processors.
history.qwen_rationale: Added javax.annotation:javax.annotation-api to both compile and annotation-processor classpaths in the bundle_jaxb POM_PATCH step to resolve the missing Generated annotation during compilation on JDK 11+.

history.qwen_observation: The UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 recipe updated the parent POM and code to Spring Boot 3.3 / Spring Framework 6.1, but compilation failed due to missing Spring 6 APIs (Profiles, EnableMethodSecurity, WebSecurityCustomizer) and Prometheus registry changes, likely because Springfox conflicts or dependency versions were not fully aligned.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing Springfox dependencies beforehand prevents conflicts during the Spring Boot 3 migration. Adding SpringBoot3BestPractices and UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 after the main upgrade step ensures remaining API changes and dependency alignments are applied, fixing the missing symbol errors for Spring Security 6 and Micrometer Prometheus registry updates.

history.qwen_observation: The Spring Boot 3 upgrade recipe failed to update dependencies because the project lacks a spring-boot.version property, leaving Spring Framework/Security on 5.x while the source code already uses 6.x APIs.
history.qwen_rationale: Adding the spring-boot.version property explicitly allows the UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe to correctly resolve and upgrade all Spring dependencies to 3.3.0, aligning the classpath with the source code's Spring Security 6 and Spring Framework 6 imports.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed at upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 due to missing Spring Framework 6 / Security 6 symbols (Profiles, EnableMethodSecurity, WebSecurityCustomizer) and misaligned Micrometer/Prometheus packages, indicating the SB3 meta-recipe did not fully align dependencies or apply source fixes before the build check.
history.qwen_rationale: Merging the SB3 upgrade, SpringBoot3BestPractices, and UpgradeSpringFramework_6_1 into a single step ensures all source transformations and dependency alignments run together before compilation. Adding an intermediate UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7 step follows the recommended walk-up path to stabilize the transition. Removing the manual spring-boot.version property prevents conflicts with the meta-recipe's dependency management.
